first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the candidate's strong full-stack background and AI-agent infrastructure work while noting the same concerns about a lack of explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, and major cloud platforms. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and show no connection to the change in location.
